phrases.intent_en: When is the next planetarium show
phrases.text_local: Kdy začíná další projekce v planetáriu?
phrases.cultural_note: Planetarium shows run on a fixed schedule, usually with a midday break.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the gift shop cashier
phrases.text_local: Kde je pokladní v obchodě se suvenýry?
phrases.cultural_note: The cashier is typically positioned near the exit to manage the flow of customers.

likely_response.translation_en: At the exit of the shop, on the right.

responses.english: At the exit of the shop, on the right.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I book workshop tickets
phrases.text_local: Kde si můžu rezervovat lístky na dílnu?
phrases.cultural_note: Workshops often require advance booking at a dedicated counter, not the main ticket desk.

likely_response.local: Vzadu za hlavním schodištěm, u pultu dílny.
likely_response.translation_en: At the back, behind the main stairs, at the workshop counter.

responses.english: At the back, behind the main stairs, at the workshop counter.
responses.local: Vzadu za hlavním schodištěm, u pultu dílny.

phrases.intent_en: Is the cafeteria self-checkout working now
phrases.text_local: Funguje teď samoobslužná pokladna v jídelně?
phrases.cultural_note: Self-checkouts are common but may be turned off during quiet periods.
